title: Luffy Enters the Mirror World
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Pudding, Unknown person #8, Chiffon as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHA-?! I get that you know what it looked like, but how do you have any idea what it was made with?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Lady! What happened?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: by its smell.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Alright, snap to it! Every minute counts!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoa! Pudding looks so cute as a cook:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Let's give it our best, Mr. Husband!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I removed the "incident" today from the chefs' memories. In other words,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As they're concerned, our ceremony went off without a hitch, and we're m- married...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, due to unforeseen bad weather, the wedding cake was ruined!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama got mad, and now we have to remake it as fast as possible!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's the story we're working with.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their memories of making the cake for the first time are still there, clear as ever! Those'll be quite helpful!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GOTCHA.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WH- WHO IN THE WORLD Drew UP THIS DIAGRAM AND WROTE OUT THIS RECIPE?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let me know if I got anything wrong, okay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Mr. Husband! You did this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's absolutely perfect! You've even included the hidden flavors that streusen took over a week to come up with!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard you were quite skilled, but this is something else, Mister!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And, oddly enough, this cake-making process will be both of your

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: First Cooperative Task As A Married Couple!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You're right, huh... makes me blush:)

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Oh, no! What's the matter, Mrs. Pudding?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Quit it! You'll kill her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: M... Mrs...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Kyaaaah's a married couple! How cute:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I... if you try to order me around as a husband, I'll strangle you, Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get these things together as quickly as possible.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Non-homogenized milk, sugar beets, bananas, black sesame, roasted soybean powder, and yogurt. Lots of it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...my dear:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Roger.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This is a race against the clock!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: chiffon, the baking of that huge chiffon cake,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And pudding, the temper- ing of the chocolate!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can both of you finish your work in 2 hours and 40 minutes?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll put my secret plan into motion then.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll show people the true face of sweetness! I'll take them to paradise!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The true face of sweetness?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll set sail in 3 hours. And, while the cake is cooling, we'll add the decorations at sea.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll have the ultimate cake ready by the time we rendezvous with the sunny!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I see. No time wasted, huh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But... we'll be so rushed...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have no choice! Do you want Mama to race this place to the ground?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We're so sorry! We'll follow your lead!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've gotta make this! For the ones that saved Lola!

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: My specialty, the heavenly fluffy Chiffon Cake!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Alright! Let's cook!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Just you wait, you lot! I'll show you real "attack cooking"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've gotta help Sanji and the others escape!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: With my sweet, sweet chocolate!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 49 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
